name: Ever-so-Easy-Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sweetened condensed milk (14 oz), NOT evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch tube pan, lining it with wax paper and greasing again. Alternatively, use a generously greased and floured 10-inch fluted tube pan.
3. Sift together flour and baking soda; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Blend in the dry ingredients.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 45 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Allow cooling for 15 minutes.
8. Turn out of the pan and remove the wax paper.
9. Glaze and garnish as desired.
